hero.summary: Computer Engineer specialized in building reliable, scalable, and business-oriented digital products with JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, and modern architectures.
hero.typingLine: I build dependable software systems designed to scale;

about.label: // About
about.title: I build software with quality, impact, and long-term sustainability in mind
paragraphs: I have more than six years of experience building digital products for fintech, enterprise services, and AI-driven initiatives.
My approach combines technical vision and product thinking: I prioritize scalability, code maintainability, and a clear user experience.
I have worked with multicultural remote teams, leading technical decisions and supporting continuous improvement processes.

experience.label: // Experience
experience.title: Professional journey
experience.subtitle: Roles across fullstack development, architecture, and AI-enabled solutions.

bullets: Designed and implemented AI-assisted workflows with a focus on reliability and traceability.
Built internal tools to improve operational efficiency and reduce repetitive manual work.
Integrated intelligent interfaces with low-latency backend services for critical use cases.
Contributed to architecture decisions to evolve the tech stack without sacrificing stability.
Built and maintained financial microservices supporting high-demand transactional flows.
Optimized payment engines and integration orchestration across REST and SOAP ecosystems.
Introduced code-quality controls and sound technical review practices.
Worked with containerized, reproducible environments to speed up deployments and reduce incidents.
Developed enterprise software solutions for digital transformation initiatives.
Implemented modular software architectures to improve maintainability and scalability.
Supported technical planning and delivery tracking for key milestones.
Produced structured technical documentation for project continuity and support readiness.

items.description: Training in software engineering fundamentals, algorithms, data structures, and technology project management.

projects.label: // Featured projects
projects.title: Selected work
projects.subtitle: Projects and products where I contributed with a strong focus on performance and business outcomes.

contact.subtitle: Open to opportunities where technology and business outcomes move forward together.
